name: Clock
goal: Show a live time-of-day clock or relative-time display, optionally for a specific IANA time zone.
description: Live clock with absolute, relative ('5 minutes ago'), or combined display. Time-zone aware via the IANA `tz` attribute and Intl.DateTimeFormat; relative-time uses Intl.RelativeTimeFormat seeded from the `since` ISO timestamp. The internal interval can be disabled by setting tick-ms to 0 for snapshot-style use.

props.name: tz
props.description: IANA time-zone identifier (e.g. 'Europe/London'). Empty = local zone.

props.name: since
props.description: ISO timestamp; required for relative output.

props.name: tickMs
props.description: Interval refresh in ms (0 disables tick).

props.name: locale
props.description: BCP-47 locale tag for formatting; empty = browser default.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Gap between absolute and relative parts.

globalDependencies.purpose: Format absolute time-of-day with optional IANA time zone.
Format relative time strings like 'a minute ago'.
Periodic re-render to keep clock fresh.

sideEffects.description: Polls Date.now() at tick-ms cadence while connected.
